name: OBIC
description: Tokyo-listed enterprise ERP (OBIC7) vendor serving Japans mid-market with finance, HR and production modules and APIs.

seo.title: OBIC — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: OBIC: Tokyo-listed enterprise ERP (OBIC7) vendor serving Japans mid-market with finance, HR and production modules and APIs.

when_to_use: Integrating Japan OBIC7 ERP with e-tax filing APIs
Automating accounts payable in Japanese mid-market ERP
Syncing production and finance modules for manufacturing firms

pros: Proven OBIC7 ERP for JP mid-market
Finance, HR and production modules integrated
Compliant with Japanese tax and invoice rules
cons: Traditional ERP UX, not modern SaaS
API exposure is limited vs cloud-native peers
review.verdict: Dependable Japanese ERP for mid-market incumbents — conservative choice, not a developer platform.
review.best_for: Japanese mid-market companies standardising on a single ERP with long-term vendor stability.
review.not_for: Modern SaaS teams wanting open APIs, cloud-native ops and non-JP coverage.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
